scheme_name: Subsidy for the Purchase of Wooden/Fiber Reinforced Plastic/Steel Mechanised Boats
implementing_department: Department of Fisheries and Fishermen Welfare, Government of Puducherry
description: Provides subsidies for purchase and modernization of mechanised fishing boats to increase marine fish production.
benefits: 50% subsidy up to ₹7,50,000 for mechanised boats above 47 feet with nets
50% subsidy up to ₹11,00,000 for steel mechanised boats (45–54 feet)
50% subsidy up to ₹2,50,000 for conversion/modernization of existing boats
50% subsidy up to ₹5,00,000 for tuna long-lining modernization
eligibility: Member of fishermen community or full-time fishing/fish trade professional
Resident of Puducherry for minimum 5 years
Minimum 5 years sea fishing experience (for male applicants)

steps: Collect application form from Fisheries Department
